introText: If you've been injured in a car accident in Oakland, The Azizi Firm is here to help. Oakland's busy freeways, major port traffic, and dense urban streets create significant accident risks for drivers, cyclists, and pedestrians. We represent victims of auto accidents, truck accidents, motorcycle accidents, and rideshare accidents. Our experienced car accident attorneys fight to get you maximum compensation for medical bills, lost wages, pain and suffering, and all other damages.

sections.header: Types of Car Accident Cases We Handle
sections.body: Our Oakland car accident lawyers handle all types of motor vehicle accidents: rear-end collisions on I-880 and I-580, T-bone accidents at major intersections, head-on collisions, hit and run accidents which are unfortunately common in parts of Oakland, drunk driving accidents, distracted driving accidents, rideshare (Uber/Lyft) accidents, truck accidents involving Port of Oakland cargo, motorcycle accidents, pedestrian accidents, and bicycle accidents.

sections.header: Common Causes of Car Accidents in Oakland
sections.body: Oakland's position as a major Bay Area transportation hub means heavy traffic on I-880 (Nimitz Freeway), I-580, I-980, and SR-24. Common accident causes include distracted driving during commute hours, speeding, drunk driving, reckless driving, port truck traffic creating hazards, complex freeway interchanges like the MacArthur Maze, and dangerous pedestrian crossings in dense neighborhoods. Our attorneys investigate every accident to identify all liable parties and insurance coverage.

faq.question: What should I do after a car accident in Oakland?
faq.answer: Call 911, seek medical attention, document the scene with photos, exchange information with other drivers, get witness contact info, file a report with Oakland PD or CHP, and contact a car accident lawyer before speaking with insurance companies. If a city vehicle is involved, special claim deadlines apply.

faq.question: How much is my Oakland car accident case worth?
faq.answer: Case value depends on injury severity, medical costs in the Bay Area, lost wages, pain and suffering, and available insurance coverage. Alameda County juries are known for being plaintiff-friendly in serious injury cases. We offer free case evaluations.

whyHireText: Our founder previously defended major insurance companies, giving us insider knowledge of how they evaluate and settle claims. We understand the Bay Area legal landscape and have deep experience with Alameda County courts, ensuring your case is handled with maximum expertise.
contactUsText: If you've been injured in a car accident in Oakland, contact The Azizi Firm today for a free, confidential consultation. No fees unless we win.
